Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
AHC Model Data File Codebook │ December 2024 │ V 1.0 151 

SR_CORE_TRNSPRTN_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

LABEL: Screened Core HRSN Transportation Overall Indicator 

DESCRIPTION: Screening result (SR) core health related social need (HRSN) transportation composite indicator. 

LONG NAME: SR_CORE_TRNSPRTN_OVRL_SCRNG_IND 

TYPE: CHAR 

LENGTH: 1 

SOURCE: AHC data system 

VALUES: 0 = Did not screen positive for transportation need 
1 = Screened
